summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ANDREPAU POS system - all requested features verified and working correctly
passed_tests: Backend API: 16/16 tests passed (authentication, products, export, stock, suppliers, NIR, backup, reports)
POS page - products loading correctly (100 products visible)
POS page - cart functionality working (add/remove products)
POS page - payment buttons visible (NUMERAR, CARD, TICHETE, ANULEAZĂ)
Products page - 'Adăugare Produs Nou' dialog opens without Select component errors
Products page - Category dropdown working with '_none_' placeholder fix
Products page - Supplier dropdown working correctly
Stock page - NIR dialog opens without Select component errors
Stock page - Supplier and Product dropdowns working correctly
Settings page - 'Descarcă Excel' button visible and functional
Settings page - 'Descarcă Backup JSON' button working
API endpoint /api/products/export/xls - returns valid Excel file (200 OK, correct content-type)
'Made with Emergent' badge - successfully removed from index.html
Role-based access - casier cannot see 'Adaugă Produs' button
Role-based access - casier cannot see 'Setări' menu
seed_data_creation: Database already seeded with 5697 products, suppliers, and users
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 2 fixes have been verified: Select component '_none_' placeholder fix working in ProductsPage and StockPage dialogs, Excel export endpoint /api/products/export/xls working correctly, 'Made with Emergent' badge removed from index.html. Role-based access working correctly for admin and casier users.

verified_fixes.select_component_fix: ProductsPage.js and StockPage.js Select components now use '_none_' placeholder value instead of undefined - dialogs open without errors
verified_fixes.excel_export: Endpoint /api/products/export/xls returns valid .xlsx file with proper headers (content-type: application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet)
verified_fixes.emergent_badge_removed: 'Made with Emergent' badge no longer visible in the application
